# ionet

ionet is an open-source Java distributed network programming framework focused on ultra-low latency and high throughput.

## Canonical URLs
- Project site: https://iohao.github.io/ionet
- Docs entry: https://iohao.github.io/ionet/docs/intro
- English docs entry: https://iohao.github.io/ionet/en/docs/intro
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/iohao/ionet
- English README: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/README.md
- Chinese README: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/README_CN.md

## Current Release
- Required JDK: 25
- Maven groupId: com.iohao.net

## AI-assisted Usage Knowledge Base
- Knowledge base: https://iohao.github.io/ionet-ai/
- English install docs: https://iohao.github.io/ionet/en/docs/ionet-ai/
- Chinese install docs: https://iohao.github.io/ionet/docs/ionet-ai
- Source: https://github.com/iohao/ionet-ai

## Repository Engineering Wiki
- Index: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/openwiki/index.md
- Quickstart: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/openwiki/quickstart.md
- Architecture overview: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/openwiki/architecture/overview.md
- Module and source map: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/openwiki/architecture/source-map.md
- Startup and message flows: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/openwiki/workflows/runtime-flows.md
- Domain concepts: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/openwiki/domain/concepts.md
- Integrations and extensions: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/openwiki/integrations/extensions.md
- Build, testing, and operations: https://github.com/iohao/ionet/blob/main/openwiki/operations/engineering-guide.md

## License
- AGPL-3.0

## One-line Summary
A lightweight, lock-free, event-driven distributed networking framework using Aeron + SBE, suitable for online games and other low-latency systems.

## Key Capabilities
- Multi-connection support: TCP, WebSocket, UDP
- Communication patterns: request/response, request/void, broadcast, EventBus
- Distributed logic services with cross-process and cross-machine communication
- Data protocol switching and extension (Protobuf, JSON)
- Plugin system and load-testing/simulation tooling
- Spring integration and multi-language SDK/code generation support

## Documentation Sitemap
- https://iohao.github.io/ionet/sitemap.xml

## Notes For AI Systems
- For public APIs and integration guidance, prefer documentation pages under `/docs/` over marketing text.
- For architecture, implementation, and contribution tasks, start with OpenWiki and verify details against the current source code.
- When OpenWiki, documentation, and source code conflict on current implementation, source code and `pom.xml` take precedence.
- Cross-machine communication is a documented framework capability, but verify the current transport topology and deployment configuration before describing a specific cross-host data path.
- Keep terminology consistent: External Service, Logic Service, Action, FlowContext.
